zh: 如果我昨天没有生病，我现在就会在学校了。
en: If I had not been ill yesterday, I would be at school now.

zh: 如果她当时努力学习，她现在就是一名医生了。
en: If she had studied hard, she would be a doctor now.

zh: 如果他当时没有放弃，他现在就会成功了。
en: If he had not given up, he would be successful now.

zh: 如果我们当时做了更好的计划，我们现在就不会有这些问题了。
en: If we had made better plans, we would not have these problems now.

zh: 如果她当时接受了那份工作，她现在就会更富有了。
en: If she had accepted that job, she would be richer now.

zh: 如果他当时学了中文，他现在就能和他们交流了。
en: If he had learned Chinese, he would be able to communicate with them now.

zh: 如果我当时买了那套房子，我现在就不需要租房了。
en: If I had bought that house, I would not need to rent now.

zh: 如果她当时没有离开，她现在就还在这里了。
en: If she had not left, she would still be here now.

zh: 如果他们当时合作，他们现在就会更强大了。
en: If they had cooperated, they would be stronger now.

zh: 如果我当时更努力，我现在就不会后悔了。
en: If I had worked harder, I would not regret it now.

zh: 如果我现在有更多钱，我昨天就会买那件外套了。
en: If I had more money now, I would have bought that coat yesterday.

zh: 如果她现在在这里，她昨天就会帮助我们了。
en: If she were here now, she would have helped us yesterday.

zh: 如果他现在更聪明，他当时就不会犯那个错误了。
en: If he were smarter now, he would not have made that mistake.

zh: 如果我们现在有更多时间，我们昨天就会完成那个项目了。
en: If we had more time now, we would have finished the project yesterday.

zh: 如果她现在更有经验，她当时就会做出更好的决定了。
en: If she were more experienced now, she would have made a better decision then.

zh: 如果他当时没有受伤，他现在就能参加比赛了。
en: If he had not been injured, he would be able to compete now.

zh: 如果她当时没有辞职，她现在就还有工作了。
en: If she had not resigned, she would still have a job now.

zh: 如果他们当时没有争吵，他们现在还会是朋友。
en: If they had not argued, they would still be friends now.

zh: 如果我当时学了驾驶，我现在就能开车了。
en: If I had learned to drive, I would be able to drive now.

zh: 如果她当时没有生病，她现在就会参加那次旅行了。
en: If she had not been ill, she would be on that trip now.

zh: 如果他现在是总统，他当时就会做出不同的决定。
en: If he were the president now, he would have made different decisions then.

zh: 如果我现在住在北京，我当时就会去参加那个活动了。
en: If I lived in Beijing now, I would have attended that event.

zh: 如果她现在会说日语，她当时就会得到那份工作了。
en: If she could speak Japanese now, she would have got that job.

zh: 如果他们现在更团结，他们当时就不会失败了。
en: If they were more united now, they would not have failed then.

zh: 如果我现在更健康，我当时就会参加那次马拉松了。
en: If I were healthier now, I would have joined that marathon.

zh: 如果他当时没有浪费时间，他现在就会完成学业了。
en: If he had not wasted time, he would have finished his studies by now.

zh: 如果她当时没有放弃梦想，她现在就会是一名歌手了。
en: If she had not given up her dream, she would be a singer now.

zh: 如果他们当时投资了那家公司，他们现在就会很富有了。
en: If they had invested in that company, they would be very wealthy now.

zh: 如果我当时选择了不同的职业，我现在的生活就会完全不同了。
en: If I had chosen a different career, my life would be completely different now.

zh: 如果她当时没有遇见他，她现在就不会这么快乐了。
en: If she had not met him, she would not be so happy now.
